zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Davenport of Henbury於1346年之前出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Sir John Jenkin Davenport21歲，母親Elizabeth de Leigh22歲。他和Margaret de Venables至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1390年在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Davenport of Henbury于1346年之前出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Sir John Jenkin Davenport21岁，母亲Elizabeth de Leigh22岁。他和Margaret de Venables至少有2个儿子。他去世于大约1390年在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Henbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of the places in Staffordshire and Worcestershire named Hanbury, from Old English (æt thǣm) hēan byrig ‘(at the) high fortress’. In some cases it may also be from Handborough in Oxfordshire, which is named from the Old English byname Hagena or Hana + beorg ‘hill’.
Irish (Meath and Galway): adopted for Ó hAinmhire, see Hansberry .

variants.name: Ansbro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Padraic.

Irish: adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hAinmhire ‘descendant of Ainmhire’, a personal name meaning ‘very wild’. This form is found in County Galway; a more widespread Anglicization is Hennebry.
English: variant of   Hanbury  .

variants.name: Hansberry
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAinmhire ‘descendant of Ainmhire’, a personal name meaning ‘very wild, warlike’. This form of the surname is not found in Ireland and is now rare in Britain.
Probably also an Americanized form of German Hansberger or its cognate Hansberg, or of English Hansbrough or Hansbury .

variants.name: Hanberry
meanings: Altered form of English   Hanbury  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Davenport of Henbury was born before 1346, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Jenkin Davenport, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth de Leigh, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Margaret de Venables. He died about 1390, in his hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Davenport of Henbury est né avant 1346, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Jenkin Davenport, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Leigh, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Margaret de Venables. Il est décédé environ 1390, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Davenport of Henbury vor 1346 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Jenkin Davenport 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Leigh 22. Er hatte mit Margaret de Venables mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1390 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Davenport of Henbury è nato il prima del 1346 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Jenkin Davenport, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Leigh, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Margaret de Venables. Morì circa 1390, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Davenport of Henburyが1346年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Jenkin Davenportは21歳，母Elizabeth de Leighは22歳であった。彼はMargaret de Venablesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1390年に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Davenport of Henbury(이)가 1346년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Jenkin Davenport(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Leigh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret de Venables(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1390년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Davenport of Henbury nasceu antes 1346, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Jenkin Davenport, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Leigh, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Margaret de Venables. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1390, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Davenport of Henbury родился перед 1346 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Jenkin Davenport было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Leigh, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Margaret de Venables. Он умер около 1390 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Margaret de Venables. Murió aproximadamente 1390, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
